title: its literally gubby (cobblemon)
description: an addon that add gubby the rabbit into cobblemon
body:
its a cobblemon addon that add gubby as catchable pokemon 

so what addon features :

gubby as chatchable pokemon 

(i public it only for test and it still alpha and unfinished)
_________________________________________________________
warning⚠️ this addon only work for cobblemon you need cobblemon installed before you downlaod this addon
